name: RBL Bank World Max Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: Other eligible retail spends (including weekday dining)

domestic: 2 complimentary visits per quarter, unlocked by spending ₹35,000 or more in the preceding calendar quarter (excl. rental spends)

milestones.label: 1,500 bonus reward points on monthly spend of ₹25,000
1,000 additional bonus reward points on monthly spend of ₹40,000
1,000 additional bonus reward points on monthly spend of ₹50,000

milestoneBenefits: Earn 1,500 bonus reward points on monthly spends of ₹25,000
Earn additional 1,000 bonus points on monthly spends of ₹40,000
Earn additional 1,000 bonus points on monthly spends of ₹50,000
additionalBenefits: Welcome benefit of 12,000 Reward Points (worth ₹3,000) upon payment of joining fee and first swipe within 30 days
Buy 1 Get 1 free movie ticket (up to ₹200 off) on BookMyShow once a month on any day of the week
additionalDetails: Redemption fee of ₹99 + GST applies per redemption request via the RBL Rewards portal (rblrewards.rbl.bank.in).
Reward points cannot be redeemed as statement credit against the card bill.
No direct airline miles transfer — points are redeemed for travel bookings and vouchers through the RBL Rewards portal at Rs 0.25 per point.
Fuel surcharge waiver of 1% at all fuel stations for transactions between ₹500 and ₹4,000 (Max waiver ₹150/month).
Concierge services including booking, travel and hotel assistance.

voucherRedemptions.programme: Flight & hotel bookings via RBL Rewards portal

salaried: Minimum age: 21 years, Maximum age: 70 years
Stable income source meeting bank criteria
selfEmployed: Minimum age: 21 years, Maximum age: 70 years
Stable business income meeting bank criteria

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-15.
Weekend dining spends of 20 points/₹100 is capped at 1,000 points per month.
Lounge access spend threshold calculation excludes rent payment transactions.
